title: DNA Extraction Using Qiagen DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit
author: Lauren Rodriguez
materials: Qiagen DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit

steps.title: Remove filters from the freezer and...
steps.instruction: Remove filters from the freezer and allow to thaw at room temperature for 00:45:00 . Ensure that all filter capsules are properly closed and labeled.

steps.title: Invert filters a couple of times to agitate lysate
steps.instruction: Invert filters a couple of times to agitate lysate.

steps.title: Incubate filter capsules at 56 °C for 03:00:00
steps.instruction: Incubate filter capsules at 56 °C for 03:00:00 . Invert filters every 30 minutes.

steps.title: Label 2 mL screw cap tubes...
steps.instruction: Label 2 mL screw cap tubes or microcentrifuge tubes for all Sample .

steps.title: Using a 2 or 3 mL...
steps.instruction: Using a 2 or 3 mL syringe, evacuate the lysis buffer from the filter capsule by pushing in 1 mL of air (while holding the filter horizontally) then evacuating the lysis buffer (while holding the filter vertically).

steps.title: Add the Sample from the syringe (0
steps.instruction: Add the Sample from the syringe (0.5 - 2 mL) to the associated labeled tube.

steps.title: After incubation, vortex tubes for 00:00:15...
steps.instruction: After incubation, vortex tubes for 00:00:15 then add 200 µL Buffer AL.

steps.title: Vortex again for 00:00:15 then add 200 µL ethanol (96-100%)
steps.instruction: Vortex again for 00:00:15 then add 200 µL ethanol (96-100%).

steps.title: Pipette the mixture (including any precipitate)...
steps.instruction: Pipette the mixture (including any precipitate) into a labeled DNeasy Mini spin column placed in a 2 mL collection tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge 6000 x g, °C, 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 6000 x g, °C, 1 minute

steps.title: Discard the flow-through + collection tube
steps.instruction: Discard the flow-through + collection tube.

steps.title: Place the spin column into a...
steps.instruction: Place the spin column into a new 2 mL collection tube and pipette 500 µL of Buffer AW1 from the DNeasy kit into the column.

steps.title: Centrifuge 6000 x g, °C, 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 6000 x g, °C, 1 minute

steps.title: Discard the flow-through + collection tube
steps.instruction: Discard the flow-through + collection tube.

steps.title: Place the spin column into a...
steps.instruction: Place the spin column into a new 2 mL collection tube and pipette 500 µL of Buffer AW2 from the DNeasy kit into the column.

steps.title: Centrifuge 20000 x g, °C, 3 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 20000 x g, °C, 3 minutes

steps.title: Discard the flow-through + collection tube
steps.instruction: Discard the flow-through + collection tube. Make sure that the DNeasy spin column membrane is dry after this step since residual ethanol may interfere with subsequent reactions.

steps.title: Remove the spin column carefully from...
steps.instruction: Remove the spin column carefully from the collection tube (do not allow it to come into contact with flow-through).

steps.title: Place the spin column into a clean 1
steps.instruction: Place the spin column into a clean 1.5 or 2 mL microcentrifuge tube and pipette 200 µL Buffer AE onto the spin column membrane.

steps.title: Incubate the samples at room temperature for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Incubate the samples at room temperature for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge 6000 x g, °C, 1 minute to elute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 6000 x g, °C, 1 minute to elute

steps.title: Repeat the previous 2 steps (incubate + centrifuge)
steps.instruction: Repeat the previous 2 steps (incubate + centrifuge). Do not elute more than 200 µL into a 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube because the DNeasy spin column will come into contact with the eluate.
